title: Dev's Pack
description: This is my own Resource Pack (Totem & Elytra)
body:
## **Why Have i made this Pack?**
Do you think That The normal Elytra and Totem need more Color? 

that's exactly what my Resource Pack adds! 

a Remodel of the boring gray Elytra and of the Totem, Themed to my Skin.

## **What does it feature?**

- A Custom Totem that is themed to my  Minecraft skin
- A custom Elytra (Entity & Item) that is also themed to my Minecraft skin
##

## **Screenshots**
![Elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4206425499cb631a140882891c73dde17ecac76c.png)

![Totem of Undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7aed071930f14e4fdf72936e821790380ef6617.png)

## **How to Install it**
1. Download the Resource Pack
2. Go into the Minecraft Options, then Resource Packs
3. Click on Open Pack Folder
4. Drag this Resource Pack into the Resource Packs Folder
##

## **FAQ:**

- Q: Does this work with other resource packs?
  - A: Yes.
- Q: Do I need any mods to use this?
  - A: No.
- Q: do I get a good Performance even with a Low-end PC?
  - A: Yes.
## **Wich versions does it Support?**
 only 1.20.1 - 1.20.4 versions of Minecraft by now.
